segments.title: Duplicate Symbol Error Investigation
segments.summary: Production build experiencing duplicate symbol errors that are blocking deployments. The issue was identified as Vite optimizer inlining the server entry twice, causing export collisions with `renderRscToStream`. This was the same issue that previously killed Alpha 3.
actions: Justin: Reproduce locally and identify root cause
segments.retrieval_summary: vite optimizer inlines server entry twice causing renderRscToStream export collisions blocking production deployments

segments.title: Vite Configuration Fix Planning
segments.summary: Solution identified to mark server entry as external in vite.config to resolve the duplicate symbol issue. Additional cleanup planned to remove redundant exports and gate the fix by build mode to avoid breaking development environment. Regression test will be added to prevent future occurrences.
actions: Justin: Mark server entry as external in vite.config
Justin: Gate fix by build mode
decisions: Gate fix by build mode to preserve dev environment
segments.retrieval_summary: mark server entry as external in vite_config gate by build_mode add regression_test to prevent duplicate symbols

segments.title: Hotfix Deployment Confirmation
segments.summary: Fix successfully deployed with CI passing and clean staging deployment. The hotfix unblocked production deployments and was tagged for Alpha 4 release.
actions: Justin: Push fix and confirm CI passing
segments.retrieval_summary: hotfix deployed successfully ci passing staging clean tagged for alpha_4 release
